Equipment overview: laparoscopic graspers, clips, suture pad with Penrose drain highlighted with arrows

reason_not_scored: This video is classified as INSTRUCTIONAL content. It contains educational slides with text overlays, narrated objectives, equipment identification, and demonstrations delivered as part of a training presentation. While it includes brief live task demonstrations (Pattern Cut and suturing examples) recorded during a virtual Zoom session, the primary content is pedagogical instruction about virtual FLS training setup and methodology, not a formal performance evaluation of a single trainee completing an entire task.
confidence_rationale: Video classification is definitive. Multiple frames contain instructional slide titles, learning objectives, labeled equipment diagrams, and narrated content. Live task clips are interspersed but serve as teaching examples within a larger curriculum module, not as standalone scored performances.
cannot_determine: Completion time - no single coherent task performance to time
Specific penalties - demonstrations are illustrative, not evaluated performances
FLS score - video is educational content delivery, not performance assessment

demonstrated_techniques: Portable FLS trainer box setup and port positioning
Integration of physical trainer with mobile/virtual display technology
Multi-camera recording setup for virtual instruction delivery
Equipment identification: graspers, scissors, clips, Penrose drain, suture
Zoom breakout room usage for remote FLS training delivery
Live task demonstration during virtual session (Pattern Cut and suturing examples)
verbal_cues: Objectives clearly stated: provide example of virtual laparoscopic skills teaching
Emphasis on demonstrating portable trainer setup for mobile devices
Focus on describing optimal FLS task setup
Discussion of optimizing virtual platform for training
common_errors_addressed: Video does not explicitly address common errors; instead focuses on best practices for virtual delivery and trainer setup
teaching_content.instructional_focus: Virtual/tele-simulation delivery methodology for FLS training rather than trainee performance assessment

summary: This is an instructional video demonstrating how to teach laparoscopic skills using a portable FLS trainer and virtual platform (Zoom-based tele-simulation). It shows equipment setup, virtual delivery methods, and includes brief live task examples but is primarily educational content about training infrastructure and remote pedagogy, not a performance to be scored.
